name: TPEN11-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the Trans-Pennine rail route from Liverpool via Manchester to Bradford and Leeds.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2020 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / TPEN11 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to TPEN11-IRF (1) (code 9365) used in conjunction with the TPEN11-TM map projection (code 9366).
